title: Year of Great Drought
description: Months without rain have severely damaged agricultural production, plunging citizens into a water resource crisis.
flavor: The government has launched emergency water conservation measures; the price of water barrels on the market has tripled.
response_hint: Passing a water resource protection act can stabilise the situation and secure financial subsidies.

title: Perfect Climate Year
description: An unusually mild climate this year has produced a bumper harvest and filled city parks with active citizens.
flavor: Farmers say this is the best year in thirty years.
response_hint: Passing an agricultural promotion act can convert the bumper harvest into long-term population growth.

title: Volcanic Ash Winter
description: A distant volcanic eruption has blanketed the sky in ash, causing temperatures to plummet and devastating agriculture.
flavor: The sky has turned an eerie orange and citizens are unnerved.
response_hint: Passing an emergency civilian relief act can cushion the welfare impact.

title: Earthquake Disaster
description: A magnitude 6.5 earthquake has struck the industrial zone, damaging factory equipment and severing roads.
flavor: The strongest earthquake in the region in twenty years.
response_hint: Passing a post-disaster reconstruction fund act can accelerate recovery and attract foreign aid.

title: Flash Flood
description: Heavy rain has triggered mountain flash floods, inundating low-lying residential areas and cutting off roads.
flavor: Rescue teams worked through the night; citizens volunteered in droves to assist.
response_hint: Passing a community emergency rescue act can boost morale and reduce population loss.

title: Rare Mineral Vein Discovered
description: A geological survey has found a massive rare-earth vein within the nation's borders — a discovery of extraordinary economic value.
flavor: The stock market soared on the news, and foreign envoys are queuing at the door.
response_hint: Passing a mining development concession act can further expand the revenue.

title: Stock Market Crash
description: Global financial turbulence has triggered a 30% single-day drop in the domestic stock market, sending investors into a panic.
flavor: Angry retail investors have gathered outside the exchange demanding explanations.
response_hint: Passing a financial stability emergency act can restore market confidence.

title: Bull Market Frenzy
description: Stellar economic data has drawn massive foreign investment, driving the stock market to record highs.
flavor: Taxi drivers are debating stock picks; analysts are warning of bubble risk.
response_hint: Passing an investment environment optimisation act can channel capital into the real economy.

title: Trade Embargo
description: A neighbouring country has imposed a trade embargo on the nation's core exports, dealing a heavy blow to foreign trade.
flavor: Cargo ships are piling up in ports and exporters are crying foul.
response_hint: Passing a trade diversification act can open new markets and reduce dependence.

title: Cryptocurrency Mania
description: A certain cryptocurrency has suddenly gone viral; vast numbers of citizens are pouring their savings into it and the regulatory vacuum is cause for concern.
flavor: Every coffee shop is buzzing with talk of 'the next Bitcoin'.
response_hint: Passing a digital asset regulation act can transform the craze into orderly financial innovation.

title: Foreign Direct Investment
description: A multinational corporation has announced plans to establish its regional headquarters in the nation, bringing substantial employment and capital.
flavor: The mayor attended the signing ceremony in person and promised preferential conditions.
response_hint: Passing a technology transfer cooperation act can ensure domestic firms benefit equally.

title: Billionaire Donates Entire Fortune
description: The nation's richest person has announced they will donate all personal wealth to the state, on the condition it be used for education and welfare.
flavor: Social media exploded instantly; foreign media called it 'the greatest act of this century'.
response_hint: Passing a donation special fund act can ensure the money is put to effective use.

title: AI Breakthrough
description: A domestic research institute has published a groundbreaking AI model that surpasses human performance on multiple benchmarks.
flavor: Tech company shares surged; governments of other nations are requesting collaboration.
response_hint: Passing an AI industry promotion act can convert technological leadership into long-term economic advantage.

title: Renewable Energy Revolution
description: New solar and energy-storage technologies have emerged, cutting generation costs to one-tenth of those for fossil fuels.
flavor: Traditional energy company shares collapsed; environmental groups are celebrating in the streets.
response_hint: Passing a green energy transition act can accelerate industrial upgrading and reduce electricity bills.

title: Surveillance Technology Emerges
description: A domestic firm has developed a powerful AI surveillance system, and the government is weighing whether to deploy it in public safety.
flavor: Human rights groups are protesting; the security services say it is a golden opportunity for stability.
response_hint: Passing a privacy protection and public security balance act can reach a consensus between security and freedom.

title: Anti-Aging Drug Released
description: A pharmaceutical company has announced a drug that effectively slows aging, with mass production expected within five years.
flavor: The pre-order list already runs to a million people; ethicists are beginning to discuss the social impact.
response_hint: Passing a universal healthcare access act can ensure the drug is not a privilege for the wealthy.

title: Quantum Computing Goes Universal
description: Quantum computers have crossed the practical threshold, putting existing encryption systems at risk of total collapse.
flavor: Banks are rushing to upgrade; the military has called secret meetings; everyone is asking: what do we do now?
response_hint: Passing a quantum security infrastructure act can get the encryption upgrade done first.

title: Medical Robots Go Mainstream
description: Low-cost surgical robots have begun deployment in community medical facilities, dramatically improving healthcare efficiency.
flavor: Surgeons are somewhat worried; patients are raving about shorter waiting times.
response_hint: Passing a healthcare modernisation act can accelerate nationwide rollout and lower access costs.

title: Cultural Renaissance
description: A powerful wave of cultural creativity has swept the nation — music, art, and literature are flourishing in every corner.
flavor: Coffee shops are full of poets; someone is playing guitar on every street corner.
response_hint: Passing a cultural arts funding act can sustain the wave and nurture the next generation of creators.

title: Mass Street Protest
description: Hundreds of thousands of citizens have taken to the streets to protest a government policy, in scenes that are both spectacular and tense.
flavor: Police are exercising restraint, but the government spokesperson is visibly evasive.
response_hint: Passing a dialogue and reform act can positively address public sentiment and defuse social tension.

title: World Cup Victory
description: The national football team has won the World Cup final with a last-gasp goal, and the entire nation is overjoyed.
flavor: The capital's streets were ablaze with celebration throughout the night; the next day was declared a national holiday.
response_hint: Passing a sports development investment act can turn this enthusiasm into a lasting sporting culture.

title: Surge in Immigration
description: Unrest in a neighbouring country has sent a flood of refugees into the nation, straining social resources but also bringing a diverse workforce.
flavor: The border checkpoint is backed up for miles; some citizens are welcoming, others are worried.
response_hint: Passing an immigrant integration policy act can turn new arrivals into a positive social asset.

title: Mass Resignation Day
description: The 'lying flat' movement reaches a peak as vast numbers of workers announce their resignations on the same day, concentrated in factories and the service industry.
flavor: Factory owners are in a panic, but workers' social media posts are racking up millions of likes.
response_hint: Passing a labour rights reform act can address the demands and gradually restore productivity.

title: Social Media Revolution
description: A new generation of decentralised social platforms has risen, the influence of traditional media has plummeted, and information flows are increasingly hard to control.
flavor: Politicians have discovered for the first time that they can no longer control public opinion.
response_hint: Passing a digital civic literacy education act can boost society's immunity to misinformation.

title: Intense Solar Flare
description: An X-class solar flare has struck Earth's magnetic field, causing widespread disruptions to communications systems and power grids.
flavor: GPS has failed, satellite TV has gone silent; someone says their watch stopped too.
response_hint: Passing a power infrastructure protection act can strengthen resistance to electromagnetic pulses.

title: Suspicious Alien Signal
description: A radio telescope has detected a regular signal from deep space that scientists cannot explain with natural phenomena.
flavor: Some are calm, some are panicking; the church says it is the will of God; YouTubers say they knew all along.
response_hint: Passing a cosmic research funding act can turn this discovery into an opportunity for scientific progress.

title: Mass UFO Sighting
description: Citizens in dozens of cities nationwide have simultaneously photographed unidentified flying objects; the authorities cannot explain it.
flavor: The Ministry of Defence says it is a 'weather balloon'; no one believes them.
response_hint: Passing a space security monitoring act can let the government face unknown threats with a scientific approach.

title: Time Capsule Unearthed
description: Construction workers have discovered a time capsule buried 100 years ago beneath the foundations of the old city hall, sparking widespread discussion.
flavor: A few of the ancestors' prophecies are accurate enough to give you goosebumps.
response_hint: Passing a historical and cultural preservation act can turn this discovery into a nationwide educational resource.

title: Asteroid Mining Opportunity
description: Scientists have confirmed that an asteroid rich in rare metals will enter near-Earth orbit; the mining window is only six months.
flavor: Space industry companies are lining up to lobby the government; the opportunity will not last.
response_hint: Passing a space mining concession act can secure the first wave of wealth and lay the foundations for a space industry.

title: Epidemic Outbreak
description: A new virus has appeared simultaneously in multiple cities, spreading faster than public health authorities can handle.
flavor: Face masks are sold out online; hospital emergency rooms are overflowing.
response_hint: Passing a public health emergency response act can mobilise resources to contain the epidemic's spread.

title: Major Medical Breakthrough
description: A domestic medical institution has announced it has overcome a disease that has long plagued humanity, attracting global attention.
flavor: The lead researcher said they never imagined they would live to see this day.
response_hint: Passing a medical industry revitalisation act can turn the breakthrough into an economic and diplomatic advantage.

title: Mental Health Crisis
description: A survey reveals that the prevalence of depression and anxiety has hit an all-time high, especially among young people.
flavor: You cannot get through to the helpline; the wait for counselling is six months.
response_hint: Passing a national mental health programme act can systematically strengthen the psychological resilience of all citizens.

title: Super Vaccine Released
description: A new mRNA vaccine can simultaneously protect against more than ten major diseases, with stunning clinical trial results.
flavor: Medical journals are calling it 'one of the most important medical achievements of the 21st century'.
response_hint: Passing a universal free vaccination act can ensure the vaccine reaches every citizen equally.

title: Global Pandemic
description: A highly infectious new virus is spreading rapidly across the globe; its fatality rate far exceeds any known disease from the past.
flavor: Borders closed, schools shut, streets empty. Humanity faces the most severe public health challenge in history.
response_hint: Passing a national pandemic mobilisation act can concentrate resources on treatment research and stabilise the social order.

title: Political Scandal Exposed
description: The media has revealed that several senior officials are implicated in a corruption scandal; those involved have been detained for investigation.
flavor: The opposition is calling for mass resignations; the ruling party says nothing can be concluded before the investigation is complete.
response_hint: Passing an anti-corruption strengthening act can demonstrate the government's resolve to reform and rebuild public trust.

title: Diplomatic Alliance Signed
description: The nation and a key ally have signed a comprehensive strategic partnership agreement covering trade, security, and technology cooperation.
flavor: The heads of state exchanged gifts at the signing ceremony, and there was laughter throughout the press conference.
response_hint: Passing an alliance deepening cooperation act can ensure the agreement is implemented effectively and its benefits expanded.

title: Spy Scandal
description: Intelligence agencies have revealed that hostile forces have infiltrated core government departments for several years.
flavor: Every ministry is vetting its own staff; all meetings have switched to face-to-face.
response_hint: Passing a national security strengthening act can rebuild the intelligence system and investigate internal leaks.

title: Coup Attempt
description: Factions within the military have attempted to seize power; loyal forces have quickly suppressed them, but the political situation remains highly tense.
flavor: That night the whole city was lit up; no one could sleep.
response_hint: Passing a democracy defence emergency act can unite the public and demonstrate an unwavering commitment to democracy.

title: Nobel Peace Prize
description: The nation's conflict mediation efforts have received international recognition and have been awarded the Nobel Peace Prize.
flavor: The representative's speech at the award ceremony brought the entire audience to their feet.
response_hint: Passing a peace diplomacy promotion fund act can extend this honour and expand international influence.

title: Large-Scale Cyber Attack
description: Government and financial institutions have simultaneously come under a massive DDoS attack, disrupting services for several hours.
flavor: A mysterious hacker group claimed responsibility on a forum and left a riddle.
response_hint: Passing a cyber security infrastructure strengthening act can improve system resilience and track down the masterminds.

title: Whistleblower Scandal
description: An insider has leaked classified documents revealing a mass surveillance programme, causing public outcry.
flavor: The leaker said they just wanted 'to let the people know the truth'; their lawyer says they face twenty years in prison.
response_hint: Passing a whistleblower protection and transparent governance act can turn the incident into an opportunity for institutional reform.

title: Illegal Arms Cache Discovered
description: Police have discovered a large stockpile of illegal firearms in a remote mountain area, suspected of links to foreign forces.
flavor: After the inventory, the weapons were enough to equip a small army.
response_hint: Passing a border security strengthening act can plug the gaps and demonstrate counter-capability.

title: Mercenary Activity
description: Reports have emerged of armed personnel hired by unknown forces operating within the nation's borders, raising security concerns.
flavor: The government officially denies it, but the military has quietly moved to Level 3 alert.
response_hint: Passing a foreign mercenary control act can give the government legal tools to expel them.

title: Nationwide Spontaneous Dancing
description: With no one organising it, citizens in dozens of cities have spontaneously started dancing in public squares simultaneously, and it has continued for several days.
flavor: A sociologist called it 'a spontaneous explosion of collective unconscious joy'; no one really understands why.
response_hint: Passing a cultural festival promotion act can make this energy a part of the city's culture.

title: Giant Squid Spotted
description: Fishermen have caught a giant squid measuring fifteen metres in length in nearby waters — extremely rare at this latitude.
flavor: Scientists are thrilled; environmentalists point out it may be a warning sign of marine ecosystem collapse.
response_hint: Passing a marine ecology protection act can take this warning seriously and launch a systematic investigation.

title: Time Traveller Claims
description: A mysterious man at a press conference claims to be from the year 2087 and accurately predicts three minor events.
flavor: No one believes him, but all three prophecies came true within seventy-two hours.
response_hint: Passing a 'Future Studies' special committee establishment act can at least give the affair an official account.

title: Government Building Haunting
description: Several officials have reported seeing unidentified figures in the Ministry of Finance building; rumours say it is the ghost of a former minister.
flavor: The cleaning lady says she knew all along, because the photocopier on that floor keeps moving by itself.
response_hint: Passing an 'administrative space psychological safety' audit act can help staff regain peace of mind at work.

title: Simulation Theory Proven
description: Leading physicists have announced they have found conclusive evidence that our universe is a simulation.
flavor: The stock market crashed, churches are queued around the block, some say 'so what', some never went back to work.
response_hint: Passing a 'post-simulation universe ethics' philosophy education act can help society find a new framework amid the chaos.

title: The Wealthy Vanish Overnight
description: Overnight, all citizens with assets exceeding ten billion have gone missing; what they left behind are warehouses full of property.
flavor: Some say they ascended, some say they retreated to a secret base, some say the government knows why but will not say.
response_hint: Passing a wealth fair distribution emergency act can ensure the resources left behind are properly utilised.

title: Everyone Suddenly Starts Painting
description: For no clear reason, this month everyone has been painting — streets, offices, hospitals are all covered in murals and canvases.
flavor: The art supply store owner says he has never seen anything like it; paint has completely sold out.
response_hint: Passing an arts education revitalisation act can seize the moment to nurture the next generation's creativity and aesthetic sense.

title: Lucky Asteroid Flyby
description: An asteroid that was predicted to hit Earth has changed course at the last moment and flown past; the whole world lets out a collective sigh of relief.
flavor: The astronomer says he has never been so scared and so happy at the same time in his entire life.
response_hint: Passing a planetary defence early warning system act can ensure there is more time to prepare next time.

title: Famine Crisis
description: The prolonged drought has drained grain reserves, and famine signals are spreading through rural provinces. Social order is fraying.
flavor: Bread prices have quintupled overnight. Aid queues stretch around the block.
response_hint: Passing an emergency food relief act can mobilise reserves and request allied aid.

title: Water Resource Recovery
description: The government's conservation measures have paid off — reservoir levels are rising and agricultural output is stabilising.
flavor: Farmers are smiling again, and water-saving habits have taken root across the nation.
response_hint: Passing a sustainable water management act can lock in the gains and build long-term drought resilience.
